apis.name: Button
apis.purpose: 按钮组件，可快速创建不同样式的按钮

apis.name: Image
apis.purpose: 图片组件，常用于在应用中显示图片

apis.name: onClick
apis.purpose: 组件被点击时触发的事件回调

apis.name: Gesture
apis.purpose: 手势类型联合定义(GestureType)，用于绑定到组件的手势对象类型

apis.name: GestureEvent
apis.purpose: 手势事件信息对象，包含手势触发时的偏移量、速度、手指列表等数据

apis.name: gesture
apis.purpose: 为组件绑定手势识别的方法，支持gesture/priorityGesture/parallelGesture

apis.name: HitTestBehavior
apis.purpose: 设置组件的触摸测试类型(hitTestBehavior属性)，影响事件分发

apis.name: TextAlign
apis.purpose: 文本段落在水平方向的对齐方式枚举

notableFindings: Gesture(GestureType) is a union type alias of TapGesture, LongPressGesture, PanGesture, PinchGesture, SwipeGesture, RotationGesture, and GestureGroup — not a standalone component or class
HitTestBehavior refers to the hitTestBehavior attribute + HitTestMode enum; the property name is camelCase not PascalCase
onClick is a universal event available on all ArkUI components (API 7+), and API 12+ adds distanceThreshold overload
